description: CompositionBlack and yellow comfort Fit running shoes made of synthetic leather with nylon mesh upper, torsion outsole made of blown rubber and yellow comfort sockliner with cushioned back soleWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washGet ready to hit the ground with utmost élan in these shoes from adidas. Employed with Geofit technology for that anatomical adaptation and customized feel and Formotion for motion control ground stability, this pair ensures ample comfort for the feet, while the mesh upper enhances ventilation, keeping the feet dry and healthy. The blown rubber outsole made of torsion technology ensures the feet get that apt movement and much-needed grip, while a cushioned backsole provides ample support to the feet, protecting them from impact.
